messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

  "title": "法律声明",

  "page_range": "41"

message.content: This section contains only the heading "法律声明" (Legal Statement) with no accompanying substantive text. It does not provide definitions, procedures, claims, dates, entities, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence. Consequently, it cannot answer any specific retrieval questions regarding legal terms, compliance requirements, liability disclaimers, or related documentation, serving solely as a structural title placeholder.
